title: Blue Is the Warmest Colour
writer: Abdellatif Kechiche, Ghalya Lacroix, Jul Maroh
actors: Léa Seydoux, Adèle Exarchopoulos, Salim Kechiouche
plot: Adèle's life is changed when she meets Emma, a young woman with blue hair, who will allow her to discover desire and to assert herself as a woman and as an adult. In front of others, Adèle grows, seeks herself, loses herself, and ...
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award87 wins & 106 nominations total
